title: Add `POST /api/vault/init` endpoint so Settings UI can trigger init
implementation_notes: Body: { vaultRoot: string, workspaceName?: string, projectName?: string }
Call scaffoldVault() — same logic as the CLI command but served over HTTP.
On alreadyExists: return 409 Conflict with message.
On success: also call saveVaultRootSetting() (from settings.post.ts) to activate the new vault immediately.
In Settings page (settings/index.vue): when GET /api/settings returns isValid: false, show an 'Initialise vault here' button.
Button opens a small inline form with workspace name + project name inputs.
On submit: POST /api/vault/init, then refresh settings state — UI should immediately show green status.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/vault/init creates vault/shared/ and activates the vault root in one request.
Settings page shows 'Initialise vault here' when current path is invalid.
After init, Settings page shows green valid status without page reload.
Endpoint is covered by at least one integration test.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/vault/init plus a settings-page flow that initializes an invalid target path and activates it immediately.
